caption: The video features a man wearing a red cap and a patterned shirt, speaking directly to the camera. The setting appears to be indoors, with a striped curtain visible in the background. The man is engaged in a conversation or interview, as indicated by his expressive facial movements and gestures. The video is part of a segment titled "PLUS POLITICS" on PlusTV, focusing on a statement attributed to Bola Tinubu, suggesting that Nigeria needs him. The lower third of the screen includes social media prompts, encouraging viewers to follow PlusTV Africa on various platforms. The overall tone of the video suggests a serious discussion on political matters.
